creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 181853
thunderbird and thunderbird-i18n, 52.0.1

> -#		soundtouch>=1.9.0:audio/soundtouch \

Either drop or apply to other gecko@ ports. It's currently just a reminder what version of soundtouch is bundled.

(In reply to Christoph Moench-Tegeder from comment #0)
> linux-thunderbird is still at 45.8.0 - I propose to set that DEPRECATED

OK. linux-thunderbird can go away first but other linux-* ports under gecko@ can follow as well.
